external_corpus.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

26.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

rubric.part: narrower / different form, or missing interactivity or fidelity
rubric.invert: REFRAMED — exists in both, reached by naming/tool/loop not a cursor
rubric.none: no equivalent (see gap_type: non_goal | arch | maturity)
rubric.confidence: H high · M interpretive · L loose equivalence, review
rubric.equivalence_dimension: F functional · W workflow · D data-model only

features.illustrator_evidence: Selection Tool picks a whole object to move or transform.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: you NAME an object by id — declaration replaces cursor selection.
features.rationale: Naming replaces pointing; no cursor selection exists.

features.illustrator_evidence: Direct Selection edits specific anchor points & paths.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: anchors edit by restating coordinates — workspace pin/nudge/snap + construct_vectors.
features.rationale: Dragging a point becomes restating its coordinate — MCP workspace pin/nudge/snap + construct_vectors edit anchors by tool call.

features.illustrator_evidence: Double-click into a group to edit its contents in place.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: name the nested id — direct addressing needs no isolation state.
features.rationale: Isolation guards against stray cursor edits; naming a nested id edits exactly one node, so the hazard has no declarative analogue.

features.illustrator_evidence: Combine paths (Pathfinder) so one cuts a hole in another.
features.framegraph_coverage: path fill_rule even-odd + holes; no live Pathfinder ops.
features.rationale: even-odd holes yes; live Pathfinder booleans no.

features.illustrator_evidence: Drag across shapes to merge / subtract them interactively.
features.framegraph_coverage: no boolean / interactive shape merge.
features.rationale: No interactive boolean shape building.

features.illustrator_evidence: Cut a path at a point, or slice across objects.
features.framegraph_coverage: no interactive path surgery.
features.rationale: No interactive path cutting.

features.illustrator_evidence: Object > Path > Offset expands a path outward / inward.

source.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

features.framegraph_coverage: no offset-path operation.
features.rationale: No offset-path op — a deterministic geometry the model could express; unbuilt.

features.illustrator_evidence: Object > Path > Outline Stroke converts a stroke to a filled path.

source.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

features.framegraph_coverage: stroke_outline() — centre-line + width/caps/joins lowers to a closed filled path (grammar-native).
features.rationale: Built (W2): stroke_outline() lowers centre-line + caps/joins to a closed filled path at author time.

features.illustrator_evidence: Rectangle, Ellipse, Polygon, Star, Line, Arc tools.
features.framegraph_coverage: rect, ellipse, circle, polygon, line, polyline (17 object_types).

features.illustrator_evidence: Set Bézier anchor points and handles by hand.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: coordinates are the pen — bezier / Path / CubicBezier; construct_vectors + coach assist.
features.rationale: Handle-dragging becomes typed coordinates; the assistive half is the construct_vectors tool + the coach construction loop.

features.illustrator_evidence: Rubber-band free-form curves as you click & release.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: Path.through() draws the smooth curve through your knots — declaration replaces the rubber-band.
features.rationale: The rubber-band gesture becomes Path.through(knots) — Catmull-Rom through the same points (sdk/geometry.py).

features.illustrator_evidence: Sketch a path freehand; Illustrator fits the curve.
features.framegraph_coverage: no freehand pointer input (declarative only).
features.rationale: Freehand pointer input is out of scope.

features.illustrator_evidence: Weight, dashes, caps, joins, arrowheads on the Stroke panel.
features.framegraph_coverage: stroke_style: width / dasharray / cap / join + connector markers.

features.illustrator_evidence: Vary stroke width along a path for a calligraphic look.
features.framegraph_coverage: stroke_outline(profile=…) — a width profile lowers to a closed filled path at author time.
features.rationale: stroke_outline(profile=t→scale) emits the variable-width body as a filled path (sdk/outline.py, W2).

features.illustrator_evidence: Calligraphic, Scatter, Art, Pattern, Blob brushes paint along a path.

source.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

features.framegraph_coverage: calligraphic pen (stroke_outline pen_angle) + scatter/pattern via repeat_along_path; no art-brush stretch or Blob.
features.rationale: Calligraphic + scatter/pattern landed (W2: pen_angle profile, repeat_along_path); art-brush stretch and Blob remain unbuilt.

features.illustrator_evidence: Pick colour; save reusable named swatches.
features.framegraph_coverage: hex / rgba values + defs.tokens.colors named palette.

features.illustrator_evidence: Edit a global swatch once; every use updates.
features.framegraph_coverage: named colour tokens are global by construction.

features.illustrator_evidence: Document colour mode selectable CMYK or RGB.
features.framegraph_coverage: RGB / hex only — no CMYK, no separations.
features.rationale: RGB/hex only; no CMYK or separations.

features.illustrator_evidence: Remap a whole palette via the Recolor command / Color Guide.
features.framegraph_coverage: recolor() — one-call palette remap: tokens, paint literals, gradient stops; plus gradient_map.
features.rationale: recolor() landed (W4): one call remaps tokens by name/value, paint literals and gradient stops, case-insensitively.

features.illustrator_evidence: Fill regions bounded by overlapping paths interactively.
features.framegraph_coverage: region toolkit: select_in / place_region / region_grade.
features.rationale: region toolkit places/grades regions declaratively; no interactive bounded-region painting.

features.illustrator_evidence: Colour groups & harmony via the Color Guide panel.
features.framegraph_coverage: chevreul.color_guide() — the six harmonies for any base colour + WCAG contrast tools.
features.rationale: color_guide() landed (W4): the six Chevreul harmonies for any base colour, ready to feed closed_palette/recolor.

features.illustrator_evidence: Tile a swatch as a repeating pattern fill.
features.framegraph_coverage: pattern, grid_pattern, dots, hatch_fill fills.

features.illustrator_evidence: Type tool sets point text or text inside a shape.
features.framegraph_coverage: text objects + flow paragraph / heading / list.

features.illustrator_evidence: Font, size, weight, alignment, spacing, indents.
features.framegraph_coverage: font_family / size / weight + paragraph flow (106 style props).

features.illustrator_evidence: Flow overset text between linked frames.
features.framegraph_coverage: flow auto-pagination continues overset; no interactive frame linking.
features.rationale: Flow auto-pagination continues overset; no interactive linked-frame semantics.

features.illustrator_evidence: Set text running along a curved path.
features.framegraph_coverage: no text-on-path (explicit scope limit).
features.rationale: Text-on-path is an explicit scope limit.

features.illustrator_evidence: Fine letter / line spacing on the Character panel.
features.framegraph_coverage: letter_spacing / line_height + pair kerning: kerned_spans (explicit pairs) and font_kern_pairs (the font's kern table).
features.rationale: Pair kerning landed (W2): explicit kerned_spans + font_kern_pairs reading the resolved font's kern table via fontTools.

features.illustrator_evidence: Warp text into an arbitrary envelope shape.
features.framegraph_coverage: non-goal — text stays on its baseline grid.
features.rationale: Envelope warp is a non-goal.

features.illustrator_evidence: Colour stops along a linear or radial axis.
features.framegraph_coverage: linear_gradient / radial_gradient paint.

features.illustrator_evidence: Colour stops placed freely across the object.
features.framegraph_coverage: no freeform gradient.
features.rationale: No freeform gradient model.

features.illustrator_evidence: A mesh of colour points for painterly blends.
features.framegraph_coverage: no mesh — the single biggest gap.
features.rationale: No mesh — the single biggest gap.

features.illustrator_evidence: Interpolate shape & colour between two objects.
features.framegraph_coverage: no shape-to-shape blend / interpolation.
features.rationale: No shape-to-shape interpolation.

features.illustrator_evidence: Drop shadow, glow, blur — non-destructive effects.
features.framegraph_coverage: ordered `effects` stack (2.4.0): kinds repeat, preset + param entries, applied first→last.
features.rationale: The ordered effects stack landed (W4, 2.4.0 additive): repeatable kinds, presets with param overrides, declarative and non-destructive by construction.

features.illustrator_evidence: Save an appearance and reapply it by name.
features.framegraph_coverage: named styles / text_styles / stroke_styles tokens.

features.illustrator_evidence: Stack multiple fills / strokes / effects per object.
features.framegraph_coverage: `appearance` stack (2.4.0): the geometry painted once per pass — fill / stroke / opacity, bottom→top.
features.rationale: The appearance stack landed (W4, 2.4.0 additive): multiple fill/stroke passes over one geometry, bottom→top.

features.illustrator_evidence: Organise artwork in a Layers-panel hierarchy.
features.framegraph_coverage: ordered layers per page, z-index.

features.illustrator_evidence: Rotate, Scale, Reflect, Shear an object.
features.framegraph_coverage: transform: Mat3 rotate / scale / translate / shear.

features.illustrator_evidence: Align / distribute objects on the Align panel.
features.framegraph_coverage: layout groups: row / column / grid, align.

features.illustrator_evidence: Multiple artboards — “similar to pages in InDesign”.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: pages are the artboards — per-page canvas + render targets replace the free spatial canvas by design.
features.rationale: Paged document model by design; per-page canvas + document render targets replace per-artboard export regions.

features.illustrator_evidence: Draw & place objects on a simulated perspective grid.
features.framegraph_coverage: no perspective grid (flat page space).
features.rationale: Flat page space; no perspective grid.

features.illustrator_evidence: Rulers, guides and Snap-to-Grid align artwork by eye.

source.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: coordinates are exact by construction — canon.content_box grids + workspace snap.
features.rationale: Guides exist to make cursor input precise; declarative input is precise by construction — canon.content_box layout grids, grid_pattern, workspace snap.

features.illustrator_evidence: Embed a raster image, or link it externally.
features.framegraph_coverage: image object: embedded or src-referenced.

features.illustrator_evidence: Object > Image Trace: raster into editable vectors.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: same raster→vector via the vectorize_image tool call.
features.rationale: Same raster→vector outcome, via a tool call not a menu.

features.illustrator_evidence: Effect > 3D: extrude, bevel, revolve with materials.
features.framegraph_coverage: Scene3D extrude / revolve + Material + Camera, projected to 2D vector faces; no bevel.
features.rationale: Scene3D.extrude / .revolve + Material are real and project to 2D vector faces; bevel is the missing quarter of the Illustrator bundle.

features.illustrator_evidence: EPS, PSD, TIFF, GIF, JPEG, SWF, SVG, DWG/DXF, PDF.
features.framegraph_coverage: SVG / PNG / PDF / LaTeX (6 renderers); no PSD / EPS / DWG.
features.rationale: SVG/PNG/PDF/LaTeX only; no PSD/EPS/DWG; renderers non-conformant.

features.illustrator_evidence: Collect linked assets & fonts into one folder.
features.framegraph_coverage: no asset-collection packaging step.
features.rationale: No asset-collection packaging step.

features.illustrator_evidence: Graph tools plot data as bar / pie / line charts.

source.title: BMG 106: Computer Graphics Part II — Adobe Illustrator

features.framegraph_coverage: Chart / sparkline / function_plot / polar_plot / kpi (data-bound).
features.rationale: Both plot data as charts; FG charts are declarative & data-bound, IL graphs are static objects you restyle.

features.illustrator_evidence: Describe art in words; generative AI makes the vectors.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: propose_from_image / run_sdk_code author→render loop.
features.rationale: No natural-language→vector path; nearest analogue is authoring by SDK code (run_sdk_code) or an image-input propose — a loose reframe, flagged.

features.illustrator_evidence: Recolour artwork with a text prompt via generative AI.
features.framegraph_coverage: REFRAMED: swap a palette token / gradient_map, re-render.
features.rationale: Deterministic token/gradient_map recolor with NO natural-language prompt interpretation — not generative-AI recolor.

features.illustrator_evidence: Identify & match fonts found in existing artwork.
features.framegraph_coverage: list_fonts resolves families, but no visual font ID.
features.rationale: list_fonts resolves families; no visual font ID.

features.illustrator_evidence: Wrap flat vector art onto a 3D object mockup.
features.framegraph_coverage: no mockup / surface-wrap of art onto an object.
features.rationale: No surface-wrap of art onto an object.
